tasks.label: Services: start Postgres + Redis + MinIO
tasks.command: $e="$env:USERPROFILE\kolibri-studio-env"; & "$e\pgsql\bin\pg_ctl.exe" -D "$e\data\pg" status *> $null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { & "$e\pgsql\bin\pg_ctl.exe" -D "$e\data\pg" -l "$e\data\pg.log" start }; if (-not (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 6379 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden "$e\redis\redis-server.exe" -ArgumentList '--port 6379 --maxmemory 256mb' }; if (-not (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 9000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { $env:MINIO_ROOT_USER='development'; $env:MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD='development'; Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden "$e\downloads\minio.exe" -ArgumentList "server `"$e\data\minio`" --address :9000 --console-address :9001" }; Write-Host 'services ready'
